api.unexpectedError: Cholakwika chosayembekezeka chachitika. Chonde yesaninso mtsogolo.
api.serverConnectionError: Sitikutha kulumikizana ndi ntchito. Chonde onetsetsani intaneti yanu kapena yesaninso mtsogolo.
api.authenticationFailure: Zikuoneka kuti simunalowe. Chonde lowani kuti mupitirize.
api.permissionDenied: Zikuoneka kuti mulibe chilolezo choyenera. Chonde tulukani ndikuowanso.
api.requestTooLong: Chifunsiro chinali chitali kwambiri. Chonde yesaninso ndi zochepera.
api.unableToProcessResponse: Sitingathe kugwiritsa ntchito yankho. Chonde tsitsani tsamba.
api.serviceUnavailable: Ntchito ilibe pa nthawi. Chonde yesaninso mtsogolo.
api.dataValidationError: Panalibe vuto ndi data. Chonde onani ndikuyesanso.
api.unableToProcessRequest: Sitingathe kugwiritsa ntchito chifunsiro. Chonde yesaninso.

firebase.tooManyRequests: Taletsa zopempha zonse kuchokera pa chipangizo ichi chifukwa cha zochitika zosayenera. Yesaninso mtsogolo.

titles.skillsDiscoveryTooltip: Pangani mbiri yanu: ophunzira amagawana zomwe anakumana nazo kale ndipo {{appName}} imatulutsa mbiri ya maluso awo.
titles.careerReadinessTooltip: Modulu ya Kukonzekera Ntchito: ophunzira amagwira ntchito pa CV, kalata yofunsira, kukonzekera mafunso a ntchito, ndi ma sub-modulu ena okonzekera ntchito.
titles.careerExplorerTooltip: Modulu ya Kafukufuku wa Ntchito: ophunzira amafufuza ntchito zomwe zikugwirizana ndi maluso ndi zokonda zawo.

skillsAnalytics.supplyVsDemandTitle: Skills Supply vs Labor Market Demand
skillsAnalytics.supplyVsDemandTitleTooltip: Maluso apamwamba omwe ophunzira ali nawo kale (opereka) motsutsana ndi luso lomwe olemba anzawo ntchito amafunsa nthawi zambiri polemba ntchito (zofuna).
skillsAnalytics.topSkillsInDemandCaption: Kutengera zolemba {{withSkills}} mwa {{total}} · {{pct}}% zinalibe luso lolumikizidwa ndi taksonomi
skillsAnalytics.topSkillsInDemandCaptionTooltip: Ndi luso lolumikizidwa ndi taksonomi ya luso lokha lomwe limalembedwa. Zolemba zotsala zinalibe luso lolumikizidwa — palibe lomwe linapezeka, kapena mawu opezeka sanathe kulumikizidwa ndi taksonomi — choncho zachotsedwa mu mndandanda uwu. Chiwerengero chimawonetsa Chigawo ndi Gawo losankhidwa; Gawo limayerekezedwa kuchokera ku magulu a zolemba za ntchito.
skillsAnalytics.gapBySectorTitleTooltip: Kusiyana pakati pa luso lomwe ophunzira ali nalo ndi luso lomwe olemba anzawo ntchito amafunsa, zogawidwa malinga ndi magawo.
skillsAnalytics.avgGapLabel: Avg. kusiyana pakati pa kupezeka kwa luso la ophunzira ndi kufunikira kwa msika wa ntchito

aria.gapBar: Kusiyana kwa luso pa {{sector}}: perekani {{supply}}%, funani {{demand}}%

stats.jobsSourcedTooltip: Zolemba zonse za ntchito zomwe zasonkhanitsidwa kuchokera kumapulatifomu othandizira ntchito.
stats.sectorsCoveredTooltip: Chiwerengero cha magawo osiyanasiyana omwe akuyimiridwa pazolemba zomwe zasonkhanitsidwa.
stats.sectorsCoveredSubtitle: Mitundu ya ntchito mwa zolemba zonse
stats.sourcePlatformsTooltip: Chiwerengero cha mapulatifomu osiyanasiyana opangira ntchito omwe akudyetsa deta.
